issues.detail: Missing comprehensive error handling and edge case coverage in the provided code snippets.
Excessive explanatory text and guidelines increase file length without adding actionable value.

scenarios.name: Coffee shop locator with PostGIS nearest-5 search on Leaflet
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses ST_DWithin/ST_DistanceSphere with ST_MakePoint(lng,lat) and a Leaflet map with the OpenStreetMap tile layer and attribution; baseline uses a generic Haversine SQL filter without PostGIS spatial indexes and forgets OSM attribution.

scenarios.name: Berlin delivery route optimization with 200m geofence
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls Google Directions with waypoints=optimize:true, reads waypoint_order, and applies the documented haversine function with R=6371000 for the 200m radius check; baseline submits waypoints unoptimized and approximates distance with naive Pythagorean math.
